program.name: eu-ai-act
program.description: EU AI Act compliance toolkit — classify AI systems, track checklists, generate documentation

classify.description: Classify your AI system's risk tier under the EU AI Act
classify.helpText: Interactive wizard that walks through the classification decision tree to determine which risk tier (prohibited, high-risk, GPAI, GPAI systemic, limited, or minimal) applies to your AI system.

checklist.description: View or manage compliance checklists for a risk tier
checklist.helpText: Display the compliance checklist for a specific risk tier. Track completion status and attach evidence references.

generate.helpText: Produce documentation (conformity declarations, risk assessments, model cards, etc.) from built-in templates pre-filled with your system data.

options.template: Template name (conformity, risk-assessment, model-card, impact-assessment, transparency-notice)

timeline.description: View enforcement timeline and upcoming deadlines
timeline.helpText: Display the EU AI Act enforcement timeline with key compliance dates. Shows which deadlines have passed, are upcoming, or are in the future.

status.helpText: Display a summary of your compliance progress across all applicable checklists, with overall score and next action items.

errors.unknownTier: Unknown risk tier: {tier}. Valid tiers: high-risk, gpai, gpai-systemic, limited, minimal
errors.unknownTemplate: Unknown template: {template}. Run 'eu-ai-act generate --help' for available templates.
errors.noClassification: No classification found. Run 'eu-ai-act classify' first.
errors.dataLoadError: Failed to load data files. Ensure the package is installed correctly.

messages.classifyComplete: Classification complete. Your system is classified as: {tier}
messages.disclaimer: This tool does not constitute legal advice. Consult qualified legal counsel for compliance decisions.
